description_long: This is a sleek, modern computer monitor with a large, flat display framed by a thin, black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen displaying a galaxy image, with a subtle brand logo centered on the lower bezel. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, metallic stand with a wide, flat base and a central support arm that attaches to the rear. The back panel is smooth and metallic gray, featuring a prominent brand logo and a row of ports and ventilation slots along the lower left edge. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-thin profile and the gentle backward angle of the support arm. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A modern, slim computer monitor with a large display, thin black bezel, and metallic stand. Features a prominent brand logo and a minimalist, professional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a thin black bezel and a centered brand logo below the screen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile and the angled metallic support arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic back, prominent brand logo, and a row of ports and ventilation slots on the lower left.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the shape of the support arm.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a matte finish with slightly rounded corners, providing a modern and minimalistic frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat pedestal base with a central, angled support arm made of metallic material, offering stability and a contemporary look.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are not clearly visible on the front or sides; any controls are likely located on the rear panel or underside of the bezel, but are not explicitly shown.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear lower left panel, with several ports and ventilation slots present.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible, centered on the lower bezel at the front and also prominently displayed on the rear panel.
